modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be several noticeable typos and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to access cable TV channels in student dorm room.

full_description_text:  
The user is experiencing issues with their cable TV service in their dorm room. They are unable to receive any live channels and have expressed a desire to watch TV shows. This problem is affecting their ability to access entertainment in their living space, and they are seeking assistance to resolve the issue.
short_description: Unable to access cable TV channels in student dorm room.
description: The user is experiencing issues with their cable TV service in their dorm room. They are unable to receive any live channels and have expressed a desire to watch TV shows.
